summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned AgriPOS Product & Inventory pages. Backend APIs 100% functional with new endpoints working perfectly. Frontend successfully implements simplified Inventory view, clickable navigation to Product Detail page, comprehensive accordion sections, and PHP currency (₱) formatting across all pages.
passed_tests: Login with admin/admin123 credentials successful
Backend API testing - 16/16 tests passed (100% success rate)
GET /api/products/{id}/detail returns comprehensive product data (inventory, cost, vendors, repacks)
GET /api/products/{id}/movements returns movement history
GET /api/products/{id}/orders returns order history
POST/DELETE /api/products/{id}/vendors CRUD operations working
POST /api/purchase-orders creates purchase orders successfully
POST /api/purchase-orders/{id}/receive updates inventory correctly
GET /api/inventory returns simplified inventory view with products, SKU, category, type, stock
PHP currency (₱) formatting in API responses working
Dashboard shows ₱ symbols on revenue (₱220.00) and expenses (₱150.00)
POS page displays ₱ symbols on prices (7 currency elements found)
Inventory page loads with simplified view (4/4 page indicators found)
Inventory table shows products with SKU, category, type badges, on hand stock, status
Clicking product rows in Inventory navigates to /products/{id} detail page
Product Detail page loads with quick stats (On Hand, Coming, Reserved, Cost)
Product Detail accordion sections working: Sales Info, Repacks, Capital/Cost, Inventory, Extra Info, Vendors, Movement History, Order History (8/8 sections found)
PHP currency formatting in Product Detail (₱45.00, ₱1,050.00 examples)
Product edit functionality working (edit mode activation/cancellation)
Direct page navigation working for all routes
Products page View button navigation to detail page
Complete POS sale flow with ₱150.0 PHP currency total
